headline: EWT, EWY, and SOXX: The Only 3 ETFs You Need for Semiconductor Dominance
summary: Taiwan and South Korea sit at the center of the global chip supply chain, and three exchange-traded funds offer the most direct way to hold that exposure: the iShares MSCI Taiwan ETF (NYSEARCA:EWT), the iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (NYSEARCA:EWY), and the iShares Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SOXX). headline: KLA Corp (NASDAQ:KLAC) Combines Strong Fundamentals With Flawless Technical Setup for Growth Investors
summary: KLA Corp combines strong growth metrics with a near-perfect technical setup. The stock shows 159% annual gains, double-digit earnings growth, and a consolidation pattern near support, making it a compelling growth stock candidate.
